seo.title: Portfolio Coming Soon | BuiltWell CT Connecticut
seo.description: Our BuiltWell CT remodeling portfolio is coming as our first projects wrap up across Fairfield and New Haven Counties. Detailed before-and-after photos, scope, and homeowner feedback will be published here.

data.title: Our Portfolio Is Coming Soon
data.headline: Our Portfolio Is Coming Soon
data.subtitle: BuiltWell CT is a brand-new Connecticut remodeling company built on 15+ years of remodeling and restoration experience. Full case studies will be published here as each project wraps.
data.subheadline: BuiltWell CT is a brand-new Connecticut remodeling company built on 15+ years of remodeling and restoration experience. We're finishing our first projects right now — full case studies, before-and-after galleries, and homeowner stories will be published here as each project wraps. Be one of our first customers and join the portfolio.

data.title: Why There's No Gallery Yet
data.content: BuiltWell CT was founded by a contractor with 15+ years of hands-on remodeling and restoration experience, but the BuiltWell brand itself is brand new. Rather than fill this page with stock photos or borrowed work, we're documenting our own projects from the first day forward. The first kitchens, bathrooms, basements, and additions are in progress across Fairfield and New Haven Counties right now. Each completed project will be added here with photos, scope, timeline, and the homeowner's own words.\n\nIf you'd rather see a contractor's actual recent work before you sign anything, we get it. Schedule a free consultation and we'll walk you through our process and references from prior remodeling work, show you exactly how we run a job, and answer any question you have. The portfolio you see here in six months will be built from the homeowners who hired us today.

data.subtitle: On-site or remote (Google Meet or Zoom). We respond within one business day.
data.consent_text: By providing my phone number, I agree that BuiltWell CT may contact me by phone, text, or email about my project, including by automated means. Consent is not a condition of purchase. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out. See our Privacy Policy and Terms.

data.title: Flexible Financing Available
data.content: Get approved in about 60 seconds (through GreenSky, subject to credit approval) and start your project today.
